engineStatus.notes: Engine scoring is frozen at verified baseline. Shallow tactical verification remains diagnostic-only and is not active in app.js final move selection.

boardGameStateModel.notes: 19x19 board, moveHistory, captures, positionHashes, pass count, finished state, undo stack and child color are maintained in app.js.

newGameFlow.notes: New game resets board, captures, ko hashes, pass count, diagnostics and starts AI automatically when child chooses white.

modes.adaptive: 自适应陪练 -> existing level 880 with conservative game-level adjustment

difficultyUiAndMapping.notes: Internal numeric engine scores are not shown to the child.

persistence.notes: Snapshots include board, move history, side to move, captures, ko hashes, pass count, child color, difficulty mode, adaptive state, StudentModel summary, game start timestamp, app version and engine version.

sgfSupport.notes: SGF export is generated by product-support.js with GM/FF/CA/SZ/DT/AP/PB/PW/RE/C metadata, pass moves and complete move sequence. Round-trip parser test passes.

serviceWorkerPwa.notes: Runtime assets are precached; old cache cleanup exists. iPad Safari install/offline reopening must be manually verified on device.

githubPages.notes: Relative paths, ./ manifest start_url and ./ service-worker registration are compatible with repository subpath deployment.

runtimeAssets.notes: Service worker does not precache or load evaluation JSON.

missingOrManualItems.item: Landscape/portrait touch coordinate verification on physical iPad

productBlockingBugsFixed: Difficulty UI now exposes four parent-readable V1.0 modes.
SGF export now includes required metadata and supports round-trip tests.
Current game snapshots now include child color, difficulty mode, adaptive state, app version and engine version.
Child may choose black or white; AI starts automatically when child chooses white.
Local diagnostics summary and debug export are available without sending data externally.
